evals.prompt: Create a Reveal.js presentation about the history of space exploration, 10 slides, dark theme
evals.expected_output: A cinematic dark-themed Reveal.js deck with timeline-style slides, fragment animations, speaker notes, and rich visual design across 10 slides
expectations: File contains valid Reveal.js HTML structure (<!DOCTYPE html>, div.reveal, div.slides)
Reveal.js is loaded from a CDN (cdnjs, unpkg, or jsdelivr)
Uses a dark color scheme (dark background colors in CSS)
Contains at least 10 <section> slide elements
Uses fragment animations on at least 5 elements (class containing 'fragment')
Has speaker notes (<aside class="notes">) on at least 5 slides
Loads Google Fonts via fonts.googleapis.com
Uses at least 2 different transition types (data-transition attributes or varied transitions)
Contains a <style> block with at least 30 lines of custom CSS
Initializes Reveal.js with RevealNotes plugin

evals.prompt: Make me an HTML slide deck pitching a startup idea for an AI-powered recipe app called ChefMind. Include a problem slide, solution slide, market size, product demo mockup, team, and ask slide.
evals.expected_output: A polished pitch deck with stat callouts, clean professional layout, at least 6 slides covering problem/solution/market/demo/team/ask, and speaker notes
expectations: File contains valid Reveal.js HTML structure (<!DOCTYPE html>, div.reveal, div.slides)
Reveal.js is loaded from a CDN (cdnjs, unpkg, or jsdelivr)
Contains slides addressing: problem, solution, market size, product/demo, team, and ask/CTA
Has at least one prominently styled stat or number callout (large font size for a metric)
Uses fragment animations on at least 5 elements (class containing 'fragment')
Has speaker notes (<aside class="notes">) on at least 5 slides
Loads Google Fonts via fonts.googleapis.com
Defines a coherent color palette (CSS custom properties or consistent color scheme)
Contains a <style> block with at least 30 lines of custom CSS
'ChefMind' appears prominently on the title slide

evals.prompt: Build a Reveal.js presentation teaching Python basics to beginners. Include code examples with syntax highlighting.
evals.expected_output: A tutorial-style deck with highlighted code blocks using the highlight plugin, step-by-step fragments, a friendly color scheme, and speaker notes
expectations: File contains valid Reveal.js HTML structure (<!DOCTYPE html>, div.reveal, div.slides)
Reveal.js is loaded from a CDN (cdnjs, unpkg, or jsdelivr)
Contains at least 3 code blocks (<pre><code) with Python examples
Highlight plugin is loaded and code blocks use language-python or language-py class
At least one code block uses data-line-numbers for step-through highlighting
Uses fragment animations on at least 5 elements (class containing 'fragment')
Has speaker notes (<aside class="notes">) on at least 5 slides
Loads Google Fonts via fonts.googleapis.com
Contains a <style> block with at least 30 lines of custom CSS
Covers fundamental Python topics (variables, functions, loops, or similar basics)
